reviews.comment:
Son muy lentos para atender. Lo bueno es que está en el centro. El kiosko y buffet no tiene nada.

(Translated by Google)
The service is very slow. The good thing is that it's centrally located. The kiosk and buffet have nothing.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJLTlDY3hBRRAB

reviews.comment:
muy buena atención! lo que si. deberían tener abierto los baños las 24hs estaba de paso cargue combustible cerca de las 4 de la mañana, consulte por los baños y me negaron la entrada de los mismos el playero de turno! una vergüenza! termine llendo a otra ypf. sepan entender que uno carga combustible y sigue de viaje! mas a esa hora.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service! However, they should have the restrooms open 24 hours. I was passing through and filled up around 4 AM, asked about the restrooms, and the attendant on duty refused me entry! It was a disgrace! I ended up going to another YPF station. They need to understand that people fill up their tanks and continue their journey, especially at that hour.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7506649888060018425/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURJODdTQm5nRRAB
